raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has become the first state in the country to restrict the use of tiny plastic toiletries in hotels and lodging establishments.",
    "Single-use products like tiny plastic bottles in hotels contribute significantly to waste that can be replaced with more sustainable alternatives.",
    "The legislation is expected to help reduce the impact of plastic waste in the environment by eliminating the use of small single-use toiletry bottles in hotels.",
    "It is estimated that billions of half-full plastic bottles are thrown away every year, leading to significant environmental waste.",
    "The phase-out of tiny bottles of personal care products is being implemented by major hotel chains including Marriott International and InterContinental Group."
  ]
}
```
